Alpha Course — Starting September
A new course starting 3 Sep at Cathcart Church of Scotland. Runs until Dec. Find out more →

Churches Renew Their Covenant
Cathcart CofS and Cathcart UF renewed their partnership, first formed in 2011. Find out more →
